name: medical billing teams in small clinics processing 5–15 claims/month tool
description: For medical billing teams in small clinics processing 5–15 claims/month, manual reconciliation causes delayed payments. We automate the reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation processes.

problem_solved: reconciliation of patient records and insurance claims
features: manual data entry for patient records
